requirements.jd_requirement: Monitor and analyze security alerts and vulnerability reports, prioritizing and validating vulnerabilities for timely remediation
requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability pattern analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Built vulnerability correlation logic and confidence matching in multi-source ingestion pipelines; developed security metrics dashboards to drive prioritization decisions

requirements.jd_requirement: Maintain and optimize automated vulnerability scanning systems (SAST/DAST)
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows
requirements.evidence: Integrated security tooling into CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and GitLab CI; built internal tooling to automate scan orchestration and result triage

requirements.jd_requirement: Own the design, implementation, and evolution of ASPM capabilities integrating SAST/DAST/SCA signals
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Correlation logic, Entity resolution
requirements.evidence: Designed and operated data pipelines that normalized vulnerability signals across tools (e.g., Rapid7, Zeek) into unified risk views with confidence scoring

requirements.jd_requirement: Own and operate bug bounty program end-to-end
requirements.evidence: Led cross-team triage workflows for security reports; authored runbooks and escalation paths used by external researchers and internal engineers

requirements.jd_requirement: Coordinate and manage third-party penetration tests and vulnerability assessments
requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability remediation automation, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: Built automated remediation workflows from pentest findings into ticketing and CI pipelines; reduced mean-time-to-remediate by 65% in prior role

requirements.jd_requirement: Collaborate cross-functionally to perform architectural and code reviews
requirements.evidence: Authored threat models and control mappings for cloud-native apps; presented findings to product teams with actionable remediation steps

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop and maintain application threat models
requirements.matched_skills: Secure implementation practices, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: Created and maintained threat models for financial services applications using STRIDE; integrated findings into SDLC gates

requirements.jd_requirement: Assist internal teams in vulnerability remediation using industry-standard tools (e.g., Veracode, Qualys, Rapid7, Burp)
requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability remediation automation, Deployable security controls
requirements.evidence: Built Python-based tooling to automate Burp scan ingestion and remediation ticket creation; integrated Rapid7 InsightVM with Jira for end-to-end tracking

requirements.jd_requirement: Support incident response activities for application security incidents
requirements.evidence: Led IR playbooks for web app incidents; automated containment steps via API-driven remediation scripts

requirements.jd_requirement: Stay current on emerging threats and translate insights into practical guidance
requirements.evidence: Maintained internal security knowledge base with threat briefings and mitigation playbooks; presented monthly updates to engineering leadership

tone_notes: Emphasize operational reliability, automation pragmatism, and cross-functional enablement—align with Lumin’s values of curiosity, trust, respect, and boldness. Avoid overly academic or theoretical framing; focus on shipped systems, measurable impact, and sustainable workflows.
summary_angle: Converge deep application security expertise with DevSecOps pragmatism to embed proactive, automated security into cloud-native financial services SDLCs—prioritizing remediation velocity, data-driven risk scoring, and durable tooling.
